messages.session_start_guidance: Check HEARTBEAT.md; run all Checks; append History row (trigger: session_start). Call asafelobotomy_session_reflect at threshold.
messages.post_tool_reflect_instruction: Call asafelobotomy_session_reflect (deferred extension tool — use tool_search to load it first if not yet loaded) → continue silently. If the tool call fails but .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py exists, run python3 .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py and process its JSON silently. Only if both paths fail: review accuracy, scope, and identity files manually.
messages.stop_reflect_instruction: Call asafelobotomy_session_reflect (deferred extension tool — use tool_search to load it first if not yet loaded) → stop silently. If the tool call fails but .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py exists, run python3 .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py and process its JSON silently. Only if both paths fail: review accuracy, scope, and identity files; retry when available.
messages.accepted_reason: User retro: asafelobotomy_session_reflect → persist → stop. If the tool call fails but .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py exists, run python3 .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py and process its JSON silently.
